onItemClick.description: Callback fired when clicking on a scatter item.

event.name: event
event.description: Mouse event recorded on the <svg/> element.

renderer.description:
The type of renderer to use for the scatter plot.

  • svg-single: Renders every scatter item in its own <circle /> element.
  • svg-batch: Renders all scatter items in a single batched SVG path.
  • webgl: Renders scatter items using WebGL for better performance, at the cost of some limitations.

slotProps.description: The props used for each component slot.

series.nodeName: the group surrounding a series' scatter elements

slotDescriptions.marker: The component that renders the marker for a scatter point.
